profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT. Indo-Rama Synthetics Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the production and sale of fertilizers, polymers, fibers, yarns, and medical gloves. It operates through Spun Yarns, Polyester, Minerals, and Others segments. The company offers polyester, such as partially oriented yarns, draw textured yarns, fully drawn yarns, polyester staple fibre, PET resin and textile grade chips, and polyester filament woven grey fabrics spun; and spun yarn, including veola cotton compact, BCI, polyester, polyester sewing thread, recycled polyester, acrylic, blended, poly cotton air-jet, dyed, melange/heather, core-spun, and bamboo yarns, as well as tri-blends and linen blends. It also involved in the trading, investment, and other activities; gold and coal mining investment; and office and school buildings management. It has operations in Indonesia, rest of Asia, Europe, North America, South America, and internationally. PT. Indo-Rama Synthetics Tbk was incorporated in 1974 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT. Indo-Rama Synthetics Tbk is a subsidiary of Indorama Holdings B.V.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
